content:
🚀 hoodik | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a secure, self-hosted, and end-to-end encrypted cloud storage solution for individuals and organizations prioritizing data privacy.
✨ Key Features: • End-to-end encryption (RSA + AEGIS-128L) • Secure search with tokenized and hashed metadata • Encrypted markdown notes with WYSIWYG editor • Public sharing links with secure key management • Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
📖 Summary: Hoodik is a self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted cloud storage server built with Rust and Vue.js. It prioritizes user privacy by performing all encryption and decryption in the browser, ensuring the server never accesses plaintext data. The system supports secure file storage, encrypted notes, searchable metadata, and various backend storage options.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
